Notice Of Hearing To Confirm Arbitration Award

MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER DEBRA DOLCH'S Hearing To Confirm Arbitration Award. Arbitration award is confirmed with interest at the legal rate from May 2, 2006 to August 11, 2006. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
